name: Cumin Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ingredients in a screw-top jar.
2. Shake to blend.
3. Serve over your favorite combination of salad greens.
Make Ahead Tip: The dressing can be prepared several days ahead and refrigerated. Let come to room temperature and shake before using.
Nutrient value per tablespoon (not included in the original recipe):
91 calories, 0 g protein, 10 g fat, 1 g carbohydrates, 0 mg sodium.
